text: Between 16/May/2026:10:14:11 +0000 and 16/May/2026:09:14:20 +0000, IP 203.0.113.91 launched a web application attack against the server, using the automated tool sqlmap (version 1.7.5). The attacker sent 8 request(s) targeting UNION-based SQL injection, boolean-based SQL injection (T1190 (Exploit Public-Facing Application)). Notable payloads included: /products.php?id=12 UNION SELECT 1,2,database(),user()-- -; /products.php?id=12' OR '1'='1. 4 request(s) were blocked with HTTP 403 by the WAF. This activity is consistent with automated SQL injection reconnaissance, likely attempting to extract database credentials or enumerate schema structure.
